title: Cazul Epstein, o mană cerească pentru propaganda rusă
summary: The article analyzes how the Kremlin's propaganda apparatus exploits the Epstein scandal to delegitimize Western elites, justify Russia's war in Ukraine, and reinforce narratives about a morally corrupt 'satanic' West. Russian propagandists like Solovyov, Zakharova, and Dugin use the revelations to portray Western leaders as complicit pedophiles while exempting Trump and positioning Putin as a moral defender of traditional values.
talking_points: Russian propaganda uses the Epstein case to portray Western elites as morally depraved and 'satanic', reinforcing the Kremlin's civilizational war narrative

The Kremlin instrumentalizes the scandal to justify the war in Ukraine and even the abduction of Ukrainian children, reframing kidnappings as 'evacuations' to protect children from Western trafficking networks
Russian propagandists carefully shield Trump from Epstein-related criticism while targeting Clinton, Obama, the British monarchy, and Keir Starmer
Ideologues like Dugin frame the Epstein revelations as grounds for a 'total anti-elite revolution' in the West, while figures like Zakharova claim Russia represents traditional values
The article highlights the striking osmosis between Kremlin propaganda narratives and Trump-aligned conspiracy theories in the US, including QAnon-adjacent claims about elites consuming children
related_concepts: convergence of far-right and Kremlin narratives
instrumentalization of moral panic for geopolitical ends
author: Francoise Thom
